heroIntro.completed: You have already completed this scenario. Start a new run whenever you want to practice the flow again and compare your decisions.
heroIntro.resumeFromPause: Your last session can be resumed from the point where you paused.
heroIntro.resumeNextDecision: You have already started this scenario. Continue with the next decision point.
heroIntro.default: Explore the context, understand the challenge, and launch the experience when you are ready.

nextAction.title: Next action
nextAction.completedDescription: Launch a fresh attempt to go through the scenario again and compare how a new run unfolds.
nextAction.inProgressDescription: Continue from your latest checkpoint and keep building momentum.
nextAction.defaultDescription: Launch the scenario to begin the guided experience.

overview.title: Scenario overview
highlights: A guided flow that unfolds step by step.
Feedback after key choices to keep the learning loop active.
A clear structure designed for focused practice rather than passive reading.

environmental: Balance sustainability goals with operational trade-offs.
Interpret signals related to efficiency, risk, and impact.
Choose actions that improve long-term environmental outcomes.
social: Respond to stakeholder tension with empathy and clarity.
Assess people-focused consequences across competing priorities.
Practice inclusive decision-making under real-world pressure.
governance: Evaluate accountability pathways and escalation choices.
Strengthen judgment around transparency and policy alignment.
Understand how governance design shapes implementation quality.
crossCutting: Connect ESG dimensions through one coherent decision flow.
Recognise interdependencies between people, process, and impact.
Apply structured thinking in complex practical situations.

prepare.title: Before you launch
prepare.quickTipText: This page is a calm staging point before the interactive experience. Review the context, then launch when you are ready for a focused run.

checklist.time: Set aside around {duration} for a focused run.
checklist.flow: Expect staged choices, immediate feedback, and practical trade-offs.
checklist.revisit: Revisit the scenario later to compare how different decisions may shape the outcome.

relatedPanel.emptyDescription: Additional recommendations will appear here as the scenario library grows.

empty.mineDescription: Start a scenario to build your personal scenario library and return to it later.
empty.allDescription: Try adjusting the ESG area filter or search phrase to explore scenario metadata.
